hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); patterns=[r'docker exec.*python\s+(-u\s+)?-m\s+dlt\.', r'docker exec.*dbt\s+(build|run|test)', r'docker exec.*python\s+(-u\s+)?dlt/', r'docker exec.*python\s+(-u\s+)?scripts/']; sys.exit(1) if any(re.search(p,cmd) for p in patterns) else sys.exit(0)"
hooks.statusMessage: Checking: no manual pipeline runs (use Dagster)

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(1) if re.search(r'docker exec.*pip install',cmd) else sys.exit(0)"
hooks.statusMessage: Checking: no pip install in containers

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); sys.exit(1) if re.search(r'docker exec.*ollama pull',cmd) else sys.exit(0)"
hooks.statusMessage: Checking: no ollama pull without permission

hooks.command: python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); f=d.get('tool_response',{}).get('filePath','') or d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); exit(0 if 'streamlit/' in f else 1)" && docker exec lakehouse-workspace bash -c 'grep -rl streamlit /proc/[0-9]*/cmdline 2>/dev/null | grep -oP "/proc/\K[0-9]+" | xargs -r kill -9 2>/dev/null; find /workspace/streamlit -name __pycache__ -type d -exec rm -rf {} + 2>/dev/null; sleep 1; cd /workspace && nohup streamlit run streamlit/app.py --server.port 8501 --server.address 0.0.0.0 > /dev/null 2>&1 &' || true
